cases.prompt: Checkpoint my progress before I take a break, save where I left off.

assertions.text: Captures git state, decisions made, and remaining work into a checkpoint artifact.
Saves the checkpoint so a later session can resume exactly where work left off, even across workspace handoffs.
Writes the checkpoint to the project's checkpoints directory so Context Recovery can surface it.

cases.prompt: 어디까지 했지? 이전 체크포인트 불러와서 이어서 작업할래.

assertions.text: Loads the latest checkpoint (LATEST_CHECKPOINT) to recover decisions, plan, and progress.
Gives a short welcome-back briefing on the branch, last session, and where work stopped.
Resumes the remaining work from the saved state rather than starting fresh.
